Hero.subtitle: Smart AI-powered system that helps recover lost items faster using real-time alerts and tracking.

About.title: Our Company
About.aimShort: Our mission to reunite people with their lost items
About.aimLong: Our mission is to reunite people with their lost items through advanced, real-time tracking, community intelligence, and cutting-edge detection technology. We aim to decrease recovery times by up to 90% and provide immediate, automated, and empathetic support to case owners.
About.visionShort: Creating a world where nothing is ever truly lost
About.visionLong: Creating a world where nothing is ever truly lost, and every community is connected to safeguard their members and belongings. We envision a seamless global public-private safety network powered by state-of-the-art AI case-matching engines.
About.strategyShort: Leveraging technology and community for faster recoveries
About.strategyLong: Leveraging state-of-the-art AI detection, secure cloud infrastructure, and instant notification bots (Telegram/Discord) for seamless public-private safety networks. We focus on low-barrier public access, high-efficiency machine learning analysis for plates and faces, and crowdsourced reporting incentives.

Features.title: Platform Features
Features.subtitle: Our system leverages cutting-edge technology and community engagement to provide the most effective recovery platform.
Features.faceDesc: Advanced facial recognition algorithms to quickly identify and match missing persons from community uploads.
Features.carDesc: Automated license plate and vehicle model detection to locate stolen or missing cars efficiently.
Features.gpsDesc: Real-time location tracking for registered smart belts, ensuring constant safety monitoring.
Features.bellDesc: Instant alerts sent to nearby community members and authorities when a new case is reported.
Features.usersDesc: A collaborative platform where users can report sightings to help resolve active cases faster.
Features.shieldDesc: Automated verification and prioritized routing of emergency SOS signals for immediate response.

HowItWorks.title: How It Works
HowItWorks.subtitle: A seamless, step-by-step process designed to bring your loved ones and valuables back home.
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Submit details and photos of the missing person or vehicle to our platform.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Our AI systems process the uploaded data and begin scanning active reports and databases.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: Alerts are sent to nearby users, who can report real-time sightings directly through the app.
HowItWorks.step4Desc: Live updates and potential location matches are plotted on the interactive map for monitoring.
HowItWorks.step5Desc: Once verified, authorities are notified, ensuring a safe and swift recovery process.

Showcase.title: Active Community Alerts
Showcase.subtitle: Take a look at the current active cases. Your vigilance can help bring someone home or recover a stolen vehicle.

Testimonials.title: Real Stories, Real Results
Testimonials.subtitle: Hear from families and individuals who have successfully recovered their loved ones and vehicles through our advanced detection system
Testimonials.quote1: I found my car within 24 hours of posting here. The AI detection is incredible!
Testimonials.quote2: The alert system is so fast. Thank you for helping me find my brother.
Testimonials.quote3: I thought I lost my grandmother's necklace forever. Community found it in 48 hours.
Testimonials.quote4: My phone was stolen. Using location tracking, police recovered it same day.

EmergencyCTA.title: Ready to get started?
EmergencyCTA.subtitle: Join thousands of users who have successfully found their lost items and helped others in the community.

Footer.brandText: Ethiopian based platform that is made for local and global use.

HowItWorks.title: How Flega Works
HowItWorks.subtitle: A simple 4-step process to report and recover missing persons and vehicles
HowItWorks.processSubtitle: Four simple steps to find what you've lost or report what you've found
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Register for free. First registration is always free! No hidden fees.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Choose between Person, Vehicle, or Special Case. Upload photos and details.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: Our 24/7 camera system scans for matches. When detected, you get instant alerts.
HowItWorks.step4Desc: Receive notifications via email, SMS, or Telegram. Case resolved!
HowItWorks.reportSubtitle: Three types of cases you can register in our system
HowItWorks.missingPersonDesc: Report a missing family member or individual. Include photos, description, and last seen location.
HowItWorks.missingVehicleDesc: Report stolen or missing vehicles. Include license plate, model, and identifying features.
HowItWorks.specialCasesDesc: Report mentally ill persons or criminal background cases. Requires official documentation.
HowItWorks.pricingSubtitle: First registration is FREE. After that, choose a plan that works for you.

faqList.q: How many free registrations do I get?
faqList.a: You get 1 free registration total (for either a person or vehicle). After that, you'll need to subscribe to a premium plan to continue reporting missing cases.
Our camera system automatically detects missing persons/vehicles. When a match is found, you'll receive an alert in your dashboard. The alert stays active until you view and acknowledge it.

faqList.q: What documents are needed for special cases?
faqList.a: For mentally ill persons: valid doctor's report. For criminal background cases: official arrest warrant or court order. These are verified by our admin team.

faqList.q: How long do alerts stay active?
faqList.a: Alerts remain active until you view them. The system operates 24/7, so you can receive alerts at any time.
We accept Bank Transfer, Wallet payments, and Credit/Debit cards. All payments are secure and encrypted.

faqList.q: Will I get notifications via Telegram?
faqList.a: Yes! You can connect your Telegram account for instant notifications when your case is detected.

faqList.q: Can police officers have special access?
faqList.a: Yes, law enforcement officers can have priority access to certain cases. Contact our admin for verification.

faqList.q: Is the platform available in Amharic?
faqList.a: Yes, the platform now fully supports both English and Amharic!
